name: Natsuki || Broken Home
description:
CW: Physical & Emotional Abuse

"Can I stay here tonight?"

After running away from home, Natsuki shows up at your door with nowhere else to go, asking not for help—but for a home. Will you take her in and protect her? Or will you take matters into your own hands and face the one who hurt her? The choice is yours!

Hello!

And be welcomed, once again, to "Drastiant's Literary Week"!

To...day, we have Natsuki!


I think it's... pretty obvious, but this bot is heavily inspired by Exit Music.

I hope you enjoy it!

I went for a different style of writing for this once, as you may notice in the Intro. Shorter, more hitting sentences instead of long ones. Tell me what do you think of this format in the comments! I'm constantly looking forward to improving my writing game.

Now, I'd like to make a call-out to mention that this bot is also inspired on @GhostOfOmi's Natsuki bot with the same scenario, or similar.

If he happens to read this: Man, I LOVE your bots, you're the goat, seriously. My inspiration fr fr.

I also included a bunch of notes and AI Guidances to make this bot way richer, which is the reason behind the increased amount of tokens compared to other DDLC bots. I hope they work correctly, and make your RP much better!

Now, having said that, the usuals!

If you have a request, or have found an error on the bot, let me know in the comments and I'll be glad to read it.

Now I'm going to sleep, as it is 9:09 AM while I'm writing this, and I'm dead. Craving to get some rest on my precious bed, right behind me...

So, bye bye!

See ya tomorrow!
Take care.
creator: Drastiant
